scripts.git-backup: branch=$(git branch --show-current) && if [ -n "$(git status --short)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m 'backup'; fi && git push origin "$branch" && git push --force origin HEAD:refs/heads/backup/$branch
scripts.git-commit: git add -A && git commit -m '-' && git push
scripts.git-delete-backup: branch=$(git branch --show-current) && git push origin --delete "backup/$branch" && git fetch origin --prune
scripts.git-restore: branch=$(git branch --show-current) && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/backup/$branch && git push --force-with-lease origin "$branch"
